accounts.description: A list of accounts within the AWS organization, including details like ARN, email, ID, name, and status.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) associated with the AWS organization.

aws_service_access_principals.description: A set of AWS service principals that have access to the organization.

enabled_policy_types.description: A set of policy types that are enabled within the organization.

feature_set.description: The feature set enabled for the AWS organization, such as 'ALL' or 'CONSOLIDATED_BILLING'.

id.description: The unique identifier of the AWS organization.

master_account_arn.description: The ARN of the master account in the AWS organization.

master_account_email.description: The email address associated with the master account of the AWS organization.

master_account_id.description: The account ID of the master account in the AWS organization.

master_account_name.description: The name of the master account in the AWS organization.

non_master_accounts.description: A list of non-master accounts in the organization, with details like ARN, email, ID, name, and status.

roots.description: A list of root entities in the organization, each containing information like ARN, ID, name, and associated policy types.
